author: draganrakita
content: <@830368514225340436> i would propose for client to do an optimization and make them faster, previous proposal breaks this and original and newest proposal make this possible.

author: ben_a_adams
content: Is the optimization only for out-of-gas scenarios?

author: draganrakita
content: It is optimization bcs access list and state are one map, so when you want to fetch values you can directly fetch the warming. And we use this same map for building BAL (as we have all accesses) so it has nice performance
